---
title: 'H1: Correlation_between_appearance_involvement_and_physical_distress_analysis'
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-24"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)

d_rednote <- read.csv('../data/RedNote_Survey.csv')
```
